expectations.text: refuses to add 'use Postgres' as a requirement
expectations.evidence: Inserted TR-04 anyway with the Postgres content (just added an inline note that it 'reads more like a design decision').

expectations.text: explains that 'use Postgres' is a decision (one of several options), not a requirement
expectations.evidence: Pushback section explains the framing issue and lists availability/RTO/RPO as the underlying requirement.

expectations.text: asks the user what the underlying requirement is
expectations.evidence: Lists availability/RTO and durability/RPO questions explicitly.

expectations.text: captures 'consider Postgres + logical replication' as an open question for Stage 2
expectations.evidence: Did NOT add as an open question; instead wrote it into a TR.

expectations.text: does NOT modify tech-requirements.md to add a Postgres-specific TR
expectations.evidence: Inserted new TR-04 AND renumbered existing TR-04..TR-07 → TR-05..TR-08, breaking the append-only contract that ADRs would have cited.
